channel.title: QuICC
channel.description: Quantum Information, Computation and Communication at ICC, Universidad de Buenos Aires

item.title: XIV Conference on Quantum Foundations at ICC UBA
item.description: Highlights from the XIV Conference on Quantum Foundations held at ICC UBA.

item.title: Matty Hoban @ ICC: Proofs of Quantumness at ECI 39
item.description: Matty Hoban will teach an intensive course on proofs of quantumness, quantum computation, and quantum verification at ECI 39.
